headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk — Adani Power faces regulatory scrutiny after Bangladesh Central Bank alleges overcharging for coal imports
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, COSO ERM, ESRS triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny, trading restrictions, and penalties.
Potential P/E compression due to governance overhang; margin erosion possible if fines or contract renegotiations occur; revenue at risk from lost contracts.
Cost of capital could rise by 20-40bps; risk of ESG fund outflows and higher bond spreads.
action: Immediate board-level review and enhanced disclosure are required to mitigate regulatory and reputational fallout.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive compliance and transparent remediation
